Respiratory Illnesses 
Social Media: For Parents (Risk for Kids) 
Dec. 22, 2025 
What to know 
Use this social media carousel and sample messages tailored for parents to encourage them to take preventive actions to protect their child from severe illness from respiratory viruses, like flu.
Format: PNG Dimensions: 1080 x 1080 pixels Language: English (US) Size: 86 KB Length: Last updated: December 10, 2025
